00024 #include "wrappers.h"
00025 
00026 #include "array.h"
00027 #include "class.h"
00028 #include "memory.h"
00029 #include "method.h"
00030 #include "header.h"
00031 #include "util.h"
00032 
00033 /******************************************************************************
00034  * Interface manager implementation                                           *
00035  ******************************************************************************/
00036 
00040 interface_manager_t *im_create( void )
00041 {
00042     interface_manager_t *im = gc_palloc(sizeof(interface_manager_t));
00043 
00044     return im;
00045 } // im_create()
00046 
00051 void im_add(interface_manager_t *im, class_t *cl)
00052 {
00053     class_t **interfaces;
00054 
00055     for (size_t i = 0; i < im->entries; i++) {
00056         if (cl == im->interfaces[i]) {
00057             return;
00058         }
00059     }
00060 
00061     interfaces = gc_malloc(sizeof(class_t *) * (im->entries + 1));
00062     memcpy(interfaces, im->interfaces, sizeof(class_t *) * im->entries);
00063     interfaces[im->entries] = cl;
00064     gc_free(im->interfaces);
00065 
00066     im->interfaces = interfaces;
00067     im->entries++;
00068 } // im_add()
00069 
00074 void im_flatten(interface_manager_t *im)
00075 {
00076     class_t **interfaces = gc_palloc(sizeof(class_t *) * im->entries);
00077 
00078     memcpy(interfaces, im->interfaces, sizeof(class_t *) * im->entries);
00079     gc_free(im->interfaces);
00080     im->interfaces = interfaces;
00081 } // im_flatten()
00082 
00088 bool im_is_present(interface_manager_t *im, class_t *interface)
00089 {
00090     for (size_t i = 0; i < im->entries; i++) {
00091         if (im->interfaces[i] == interface) {
00092             return true;
00093         }
00094     }
00095 
00096     return false;
00097 } // im_is_present()
00098 
00099 /******************************************************************************
00100  * Class implementation                                                       *
00101  ******************************************************************************/
00102 
00108 bool class_is_parent(const class_t *parent, const class_t *child)
00109 {
00110     do {
00111         if (parent == child->parent) {
00112             return true;
00113         }
00114 
00115         child = child->parent; // Climb up in the hierarchy
00116     } while (child != NULL);
00117 
00118     return false;
00119 } // class_is_parent()
00120 
00126 void class_add_field(class_t *cl, const field_info_t *info,
00127                      const field_attributes_t *attr)
00128 {
00129     field_t *field = cl->fields + cl->fields_n;
00130 
00131     field->access_flags = info->access_flags;
00132     field->name = info->name;
00133     field->descriptor = info->descriptor;
00134 
00135     if (field_is_static(field) && attr->constant_value_found) {
00136         /* Store the constant value index in the offset making it non-zero,
00137          * this will be used during initialization when static fields are
00138          * laid out and initialized */
00139         field->offset = attr->constant_value_index;
00140     }
00141 
00142     cl->fields_n++;
00143 } // class_add_field()
00144 
00153 field_t *class_get_field(const class_t *cl, const char *name,
00154                          const char *descriptor, bool stat)
00155 {
00156     field_t *field;
00157 
00158     for (size_t i = 0; i < cl->fields_n; i++) {
00159         field = cl->fields + i;
00160 
00161         if ((strcmp(field->name, name) == 0)
00162             && (strcmp(field->descriptor, descriptor) == 0)
00163             && (field_is_static(field) == stat))
00164         {
00165             return field;
00166         }
00167     }
00168 
00169     return NULL;
00170 } // class_get_field()
00171 
00175 void class_purge_initializer(class_t *cl)
00176 {
00177     method_purge(mm_get(cl->method_manager, "<clinit>", "()V"));
00178 } // class_purge_initializer()
00179
